SEARCH
Package store

Class SalableProduct

java.lang.Object
store.SalableProduct
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<SalableProduct>
Direct Known Subclasses:
Armor, Health, Weapon
public class SalableProduct extends Object implements Comparable<SalableProduct>
Represents a product that can be sold in the store.
